mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, capability_code, protocol_tool_name, capability_name, description, source_type, source_key, source_version, current_version, schema_checksum, behavior, risk_level, visibility, publish_status, enabled, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ai_capability WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0
AND (capability_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR capability_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR source_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND publish_status = #{publishStatus}
ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM ai_capability WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_capability WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND capability_code = #{capabilityCode} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_capability WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND protocol_tool_name = #{toolName} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
